title: orobanche mauretanica subsp. helichrysi
intro: Orobanche mauretanica subsp. helichrysi, also known as the Helichrysum broomrape, is a parasitic plant that belongs to the Orobanche genus, which are known as broomrapes. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Orobanche mauretanica subsp. helichrysi include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
